atoms.semantic_claim: The old payload store changes default payload resolution from `PayloadKind::Earliest` to `PayloadKind::WaitForPending`, so callers of `resolve()` wait for an in-progress build to complete instead of immediately racing/resolving the earliest available payload.

destinations.evidence: Current `PayloadStore::resolve` documents WaitForPending and calls `self.resolve_kind(id, PayloadKind::WaitForPending).await`.

atoms.equivalence_argument: The current port exactly preserves the old default resolve behavior: `PayloadStore::resolve()` uses `WaitForPending` rather than `Earliest`.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Create an in-progress payload job and assert `PayloadStore::resolve` resolves through `PayloadKind::WaitForPending`.
atoms.notes: Stale record fixed after current-code recheck; the source behavior is now present.

summary: Stale finding resolved: `PayloadStore::resolve()` now defaults to `PayloadKind::WaitForPending`, matching the old downstream behavior.
notes: Current code in `crates/payload/builder/src/service.rs` documents WaitForPending and calls `resolve_kind(id, PayloadKind::WaitForPending)`.
No payload resolution FSM gap remains for this file.
